name: No Filter

blacks.text: My doctor told me I have ______ where I shouldn't.
My ex left me for ______. I can't blame them.
At my funeral I want ______ playing as they close the coffin.
The worst thing about getting older is ______.
My most embarrassing internet search: ______.
I tried ______ and I swear it's not that bad.
The new trend on OnlyFans: ______.
My therapist quit after I told them about ______.
The next Olympic sport should be ______.
______ and ______ are basically the same thing if you think about it.
I've never forgiven myself for ______.
The real reason I moved out of my parents' house: ______.
New Netflix reality show: Thirty Days with ______.
Science confirms that ______ is more pleasurable than sex.
In my will, I'm leaving everything to ______ because they deserve it.
My partner suggested we try ______. We're divorced now.
My only viable retirement plan is ______.
They caught me doing ______ at work and gave me a promotion.
The best icebreaker on a first date: ______.
Police report: the suspect fled using ______ as a disguise.
The secret behind my grandparents' 50-year marriage: ______ and plenty of ______.
My favourite habit I never tell anyone about: ______.
The government is proposing a new tax on ______.
There are two types of people: those who admit to ______ and those who lie.
My midlife crisis led me to ______.

whites: Lying about having read the book
Screaming at the referee from the sofa
Eating standing up over the sink
Stalking your ex with a fake account
Buying something expensive and hiding it
Faking illness to get out of something
Having a crush on your doctor
Talking to yourself in the car
Someone else's body odour on the tube
Sending nudes to the wrong group
Having sex with your socks on
The electricity bill after the holidays
Touching yourself while thinking about someone inappropriate
The next-day karma of overdoing it
Cringing at something from 15 years ago
Pretending not to care when you do
The first time everything went wrong
The colleague who gives you their number unsolicited
Googling your date before you meet
The moment you realise you're no longer young
Having sex while thinking about the mortgage
The diet that starts on Monday
Sending a love message to your boss by mistake
Arguing about politics at Christmas dinner
The smell of popcorn in the cinema
The paranoia that your phone is being tapped
Getting jealous of a fictional character
Accidentally liking a photo from 3 years ago
Pretending not to see someone you know in the street
Your first love who doesn't know you exist
Clothes that don't fit but you won't throw away
Breaking up with someone over WhatsApp
The fear that people can read your mind
Talking badly about someone and they're right behind you
The awkward silence in the lift
Paying only for popcorn with a card
Falling in love with someone who doesn't exist
